instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `74e4785` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master`.

Resolved the conflict using the newer Stanford bio. Working tree is clean; merge commit is `8dde270`.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -20 && printf '
-- recent all --
' && git log --all --graph --decorate --oneline -20

git show --stat --oneline --decorate 74e4785 && printf '
-- commit graph/parents --
' && git log --graph --oneline --decorate --all 74e4785^..master && printf '
-- diff --
' && git diff --stat master...74e4785 && git

git checkout --theirs -- _includes/about.md && git add _includes/about.md && git commit --no-edit && printf '
-- status/log --
' && git status --short --branch && git log --graph --decorate --oneline -5 && printf '
--
